texto: You’re throwing stonesacross my waterbut my inner sea stay calm,whatever happens.The peaceful sound of the moving watermakes everything fade . . .and if waves will growit will be just to wash everything away.A clean surface will rise, sand returns white.My heart is see-throughwith brand new intentions.I'm floating with no reason, and I'm so fucking good baby.And he softly whispered: Too many tides will destroy your beautybut it's not your fault, it's the moon to blame.
explicacao: Citação de Fernweher sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “You’re throwing stonesacross my waterbut my inner sea stay calm,whatever happens.The peaceful sou…” articula amor, heart, moon em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como moon e music.
